workflows.name: Update Cart Total
workflows.description: Calculate the total price of all items in the cart and update the totalCart variable. For each item in the cart, multiply its price by its quantity, then sum all these values and store the result in the totalCart variable.

it.code:
const products = context.item.data?.['products'] || [];

return 'Ingredienti: ' + products.map(p => p.name).join(', ');
